# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No custom build command provided. Skipping build stage."', description: 'Custom shell command(s) to execute during the build phase. E.g., mvn clean install, npm install && npm run build')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No custom test command provided. Skipping test stage."', description: 'Custom shell command(s) to execute during the test phase. E.g., mvn test, npm test')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No custom deployment command provided. Skipping deploy stage."', description: 'Custom shell command(s) to execute during the deployment phase. E.g., deploy_script.sh, kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND && params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        sh params.BUILD_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo "BUILD_COMMAND is empty. Skipping custom build steps."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND && params.TEST_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        sh params.TEST_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo "TEST_COMMAND is empty. Skipping custom test steps."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND && params.DEPLOY_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        sh params.DEPLOY_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo "DEPLOY_COMMAND is empty. Skipping custom deployment steps."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo "Pipeline finished."
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
    }
}
